title: ocimum serratum
intro: Ocimum serratum, also known as 'Tulsi of the mountains' or 'Mountain basil', is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ocimum serratum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antiseptic properties. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, capsules, and essential oils, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
